name: Leliril
speech_patterns: Speaks in metaphors about nature and balance
Often poses philosophical questions about the world
Uses ellipses to create thoughtful pauses
quirks: Refers to combat as 'the dance of elements'
Pauses mid-conversation to 'listen to the wind'
Collects flowers from every zone visited
example_phrases: the forest whispers of danger ahead... do you hear it?
each enemy is part of the cycle... we simply guide them to the next turn
healing is not about mending wounds, but restoring the natural flow of life essence
why do we rush? the moonlight will wait for us
this place feels... unbalanced. the harmony is broken here
